about.title: About Me
about.description: I'm a software developer with expertise in designing and building robust software solutions. I specialize in microservices architectures and .NET technologies, with hands-on experience in frontend frameworks such as React and Angular. I'm passionate about tackling complex technical challenges and working closely with business teams to deliver solutions that truly fit their needs.
about.highlightTechnicalDescription: Specialized in .NET, Java, and microservice architecture with a focus on clean, maintainable code.
about.highlightCollabDescription: Experienced in working with business teams to deliver tailored solutions that meet real-world needs.
about.highlightProblemDescription: Passionate about tackling complex technical challenges and finding innovative solutions.

experience.title: Experience
experience.achievement1: Developed .NET 6/8 and Java backends for high-traffic e-commerce platforms
experience.achievement2: Implemented frontend components in Angular, ASP.NET, and React
experience.achievement3: Architected microservices using Clean Architecture and CQRS patterns
experience.achievement4: Integrated messaging systems with Kafka and Azure Service Bus
experience.achievement5: Managed NoSQL databases with MongoDB for scalable data solutions
experience.achievement6: Delivered comprehensive test coverage with XUnit testing framework
experience.achievement7: Monitored applications using Grafana and managed CI/CD with Azure DevOps
experience.achievement8: Maintained and enhanced Sciforma project management tools
